title: Korak 76

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
text = 'Hello Zaira'
custom_key = 'python'

def vigenere(message, key, direction):
    key_index = 0
    alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
    final_message = ''

    for char in message.lower():
    
        # Append space to the message
        if char == ' ':
            final_message += char
        else:        
            # Find the right key character to encode
            key_char = key[key_index % len(key)]
            key_index += 1

            # Define the offset and the encrypted letter
            offset = alphabet.index(key_char)
            index = alphabet.find(char)
            new_index = (index + offset*direction) % len(alphabet)
            final_message += alphabet[new_index]
    
    return final_message
    
encryption = vigenere(text, custom_key, 1)
print(encryption)
decryption = vigenere(encryption, custom_key, -1)
print(decryption)

text = 'Hello Zaira'
custom_key = 'python'

def vigenere(message, key, direction):
    key_index = 0
    alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
    final_message = ''

    for char in message.lower():
    
        # Append space to the message
        if char == ' ':
            final_message += char
        else:        
            # Find the right key character to encode
            key_char = key[key_index % len(key)]
            key_index += 1

            # Define the offset and the encrypted letter
            offset = alphabet.index(key_char)
            index = alphabet.find(char)
            new_index = (index + offset*direction) % len(alphabet)
            final_message += alphabet[new_index]
    
    return final_message
    
encryption = vigenere(text, custom_key, 1)
print(encryption)
decryption = vigenere(encryption, custom_key, -1)
print(decryption)

tests.text: Tvoj drugi komentar treba da bude Find the right key character to encode/decode.
Tvoj treći komentar bi trebalo da bude Define the offset and the encrypted/decrypted letter.

description: Takođe ispravite svoje komentare. Vaš drugi komentar bi trebalo da glasi encode/decode umesto encode. Treći vaš komentar bi trebalo da glasi encrypted/decrypted umesto encrypted.
